changes: Rewrote Attendance page presentation to match 02-chamada.png 1:1. Replaced old Header (sticky, border, surface bg) with ScreenHeader (bg-app, no border, Archivo extrabold title). Added counter card (white rounded-16 shadow-md) with big green font-num present count + /total + 'confirmados' label. Student rows now use shadow-sm rounded-14 cards (no border), Avatar 40px, name bold 15px + position label below (11.5px fg-4). CTA dock uses gradient-to-t from-app with arrow-right icon + present count in label. All hooks, state, navigation, loading, and empty state logic preserved unchanged.
